body.title: Surface top violation targets in context-load briefing
body.result: python run violation-summary in context-load/run; reads top_violations() from violation_log.jsonl; silent when empty; step 5.9 added to SKILL.md; 4 tests pass
body.description:
Surface top recurring violations in context-load so CC sees its own drift pattern at session start — this closes the reinforcement loop.

**Proposed shape:** Add step to skills/context-load/run: call top_violations(5, days=30), format as 'Most-forgotten rules: [1. <flag_name> (N times), ...]', include in session briefing. When log is empty or <7 days old: silent.

**Affected files:** skills/context-load/run, lab/claudecode/skill_telemetry.py (import only)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Read-only use of violation log; no new logging here
**Test plan:** Test with fixture violation_log.jsonl; verify correct top-5 output
